title: Shiny Ores
description: Makes the ores in Minecraft glow and easier to see in the dark Glowing, Visible, Emissive, Outline
body:
# **A resource pack for vanilla gameplay to make mining a little more exciting**

![enter image description here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oYrEfh82/images/a6d7e07f16c0008c84f600032f6e34d5b03989ed.png)

requires connected and emissive textures. [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads)  or  [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

[CurseForge Listing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/shiny-ores-countxd)
